title: gaya disticha
intro: Gaya disticha, also known as the two-ranked gaya or gaya leaf, is a type of plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of gaya disticha include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herb in traditional remedies. Gaya disticha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
